\tzpentry{ID3437}{Seg Genome Unit Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3437 introduces Seg Genome Unit Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ N_{seg} \approx \frac{L_{genome}}{L_{unit}} = \frac{10^9}{6.51 \times 10^3} \approx 153,600 $$
